medialive.channel.audiochannelmapping.Cf:
The settings for remixing audio.

The parent of this entity is RemixSettings.

medialive.channel.audiochannelmapping.In.Description: The indices and gain values for each input channel that should be remixed into this output channel.

medialive.channel.audiochannelmapping.Ou.Description: The index of the output channel that is being produced.
